about.name: Carlos Martínez
about.bio1:
Front-end developer and explorer of the digital cosmos from Santiago, Chile.

This site was born at the intersection of code and cosmic curiosity. AI tools helped me build it; Ra's teachings gave it meaning. It's a free gift for anyone who wants to use it.

A personal note: the cycles we calculate here are not predictions or destiny. They are invitations. Every challenge that appears in your chart —every square, every difficult transit— is exactly that: an invitation to choose.

We are on an extraordinary planet, surrounded by lessons disguised as problems. Every fall is an opportunity to rise up choosing love. Every mistake, a door. Everything that comes to shake you from your center is, seen with different eyes, the most precious catalyst you could receive.

Enjoy the journey. All is well.
about.bio2: This project combines my interest in programming with the fascination for cosmic cycles and the teachings of Ra.
